page_title: Evangelion VR The Throne of Souls: Berserk
text:
is a Virtual Reality Attraction developed by khara inc. and BANDAI NAMCO Entertainment. It is the upgraded version of Evangelion VR The Throne of Souls. Now with the capability of four members at the same time with the Evangelion Mark.06 being the fourth Evangelion. https://www.famitsu.com/news/201712/22148707.html This version was released on 27 December 2017.
